_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: Node.js Custom (Universal Pro)
author: dapaupau@sigaul.com
description: Pro-tier Node.js egg by YuraCloud. Optimized for performance, auto-updates, and full customization.
startup: if [ -d .git ] && [ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "1" ]; then echo "Pulling latest changes from GitHub..."; git pull origin ${GIT_BRANCH:-main}; fi; if [ -f package.json ]; then npm install --production --no-audit --no-fund; fi; export NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=$(($SERVER_MEMORY - 64)) --use-openssl-ca"; exec ${CMD_RUN}

installation.script:
#!/bin/sh
apk add --no-cache curl git nodejs npm
cd /mnt/server

# --- Clone from GitHub if repository URL is provided ---
if [ -n "${GIT_REPO_URL}" ] && [ ! -d .git ]; then
    echo "Cloning repository from ${GIT_REPO_URL}..."
    rm -rf /mnt/server/*
    rm -rf /mnt/server/.[!.]*
    git clone -b ${GIT_BRANCH:-main} ${GIT_REPO_URL} /tmp/repo
    mv /tmp/repo/.git /mnt/server/
    mv /tmp/repo/* /mnt/server/ 2>/dev/null || true
    mv /tmp/repo/.[!.]* /mnt/server/ 2>/dev/null || true
    rm -rf /tmp/repo
    echo "Repository cloned successfully!"
elif [ -n "${GIT_REPO_URL}" ] && [ -d .git ]; then
    echo "Git repository already exists, pulling latest changes..."
    git fetch origin
    git reset --hard origin/${GIT_BRANCH:-main}
    echo "Repository updated successfully!"
fi

# --- Create default files if needed ---
if [ ! -f package.json ]; then
cat << 'EOF' > package.json
{
  "name": "yuracloud-app",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "Node.js application on YuraCloud",
  "main": "index.js",
  "scripts": {
    "start": "node index.js"
  },
  "author": "YuraCloud",
  "license": "ISC"
}
EOF
fi

if [ -f package.json ]; then
    npm install --production --no-audit --no-fund --loglevel=error
    npm cache clean --force
fi

if [ ! -f index.js ]; then
cat << 'EOF' > index.js
const http = require('http');

const port = process.env.PORT || process.env.SERVER_PORT || 8080;

const server = http.createServer((req, res) => {
  res.statusCode = 200;
  res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/plain');
  res.end('Hello from YuraCloud Node.js!\\n');
});

server.listen(port, () => {
  console.log(`Server started on :${port}`);
});
EOF
fi

# --- Auto-detect Region ---
DETECTED_REGION=$(curl -s http://ip-api.com/line?fields=country | head -n 1)
if [ -z "$DETECTED_REGION" ]; then DETECTED_REGION="Unknown"; fi

# --- Branding and Information ---
echo ""
echo "=================================================="
echo "                  YuraCloud                       "
echo "=================================================="
echo "Informasi Server:"
echo "UUID      : ${P_SERVER_UUID}"
echo "Region    : ${DETECTED_REGION}"
echo "Port      : ${SERVER_PORT}"
echo "Egg Type  : Node.js"
if [ -n "${GIT_REPO_URL}" ]; then
echo "GitHub    : ${GIT_REPO_URL}"
echo "Branch    : ${GIT_BRANCH:-main}"
fi
echo "=================================================="
echo "    Terima kasih sudah membeli di YuraCloud!      "
echo "=================================================="
echo ""

variables.name: Command Run
variables.description: The command that will be executed to start your application.

variables.name: Node Version
variables.description: Select the Node.js version to display (Note: Depends on Docker image tag).

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pull latest changes from git on startup if .git exists.

variables.name: GitHub Repository URL
variables.description: GitHub repository URL to clone (e.g., https://github.com/username/repo.git). Leave empty to skip auto-deployment.

variables.name: GitHub Branch
variables.description: Branch to clone/pull from GitHub repository.
